raw_results_policy: Raw benchmark JSON and log outputs are intentionally untracked. Re-run the retained Phase 1b benchmark scripts to regenerate local raw outputs.
final_decisions: Layer-ahead COTS prefetch remains the production prefetch path.
Three-way dispatch keeps CPU compute, prefetched GPU compute, and GPU-resident compute under Planner control.
The runtime K/V guard experiment was rejected; the Planner owns routing.
Row-prefetch uses unified transposed CPU storage instead of a duplicate prefetch source buffer.
important_experiments_preserved_in_docs: COTS exact-match comparison against native prefetch-defer at matched offloaded GiB
collaborative CPU plus prefetch split comparison
path contention comparison between CPU-only, prefetch-only, and collaborative COTS
